theme_archetype.description: A polished, cinematic, premium SaaS aesthetic. Avoid harsh brutalist elements. Instead, leverage subtle glows, smooth corner radii, layered depth, soft borders, and rich micro-interactions (similar to Linear or Vercel).

typography.strategy: Modern Tech pairing, ensuring a clear, readable but distinctive look.

components.buttons: Premium buttons: padding px-6 py-3, text-sm font-medium, rounded-xl. Add 'relative overflow-hidden' for subtle hover shine effects. Use transition-all duration-200.
components.cards: Premium glass cards: bg-zinc-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8. Inner content spaced generously (gap-6).
components.inputs: Inputs: bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200.
components.file_upload_zone: Dashed border area: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 hover:border-blue-500/50 hover:bg-blue-500/5 transition-all cursor-pointer.
components.history_item: Row layout: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/30 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl hover:bg-zinc-900/60 transition-colors group.
components.whatsapp_cta: Floating/inline button: bg-[#25D366]/10 text-[#25D366] border border-[#25D366]/20 hover:bg-[#25D366] hover:text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-semibold transition-all.

login_background.description: Dark blue purple abstract fluid wallpaper, used as an ambient background in the login screen (with heavy blur).

user_avatar_placeholder.description: Professional profile portrait for the logged-in user placeholder.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='upload-image-button', data-testid='record-audio-btn', data-testid='whatsapp-share-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Ensure buttons and inputs have clear focus:ring-2 visible for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a beautiful Login screen utilizing the provided abstract background with an overlay/blur to give a cinematic entrance.
Implement the Dashboard with a sticky glassmorphic header.
Build the two main functional panels (Image Analysis and Audio Transcribe) as Framer Motion staggered cards.
For the audio section, use Framer Motion for the pulsing mic button when actively 'recording'.
Include an interactive Recent History list where each item reveals a WhatsApp Share button and a Delete button on hover.
Ensure the entire app responds beautifully on mobile, stacking the upload and audio panels cleanly.
Apply data-testid to all buttons and actionable areas.
